name: Flutter Development Environment
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y ninja-build libgtk-3-dev && git clone https://github.com -b stable /home/vscode/flutter && echo 'export PATH=/home/vscode/flutter/bin:$PATH' >> /home/vscode/.bashrc && echo 'export PATH=/home/vscode/flutter/bin:$PATH' >> /home/vscode/.zshrc
